Journal.Title: Zhen ci yan jiu = Acupuncture research

Article.ArticleTitle: [Effect of acupuncture at Jiaji on F-wave and clinical efficacy in stroke patients with upper limb spasticity on the hemiplegic side].

Abstract.AbstractText: To observe the effect and clinical efficacy of acupuncture at Jiaji (EX-B2) on F-wave latency and amplitude in stroke patients with hemiplegic upper limb spasticity.

A total of seventy-six patients with hemiplegia after stroke were randomly and equally divided into an observation group (38 cases, 3 cases dropped off) and a control group (38 cases, 2 cases dropped off). The both groups received basic medical treatment, acupuncture at Jianyu(LI15), Quchi (LI11), Huantiao (GB30), Yanglingquan (GB34) and rehabilitation training. The observation group received acupuncture at Jiaji point (C4 to T5) on the hemiplegic side. The treatment lasted 30 min per session, once daily, 5 times a week for 4 weeks. The F-wave latency and amplitude of the median nerve on the affected side were measured, and scores of the modified Ashworth scale (MAS) and the Fugl-Meyer assessment-upper extremity (FMA-UE) were evaluated before treatment and after 4 weeks of treatment.

After 4 weeks of treatment, F-wave latency in the hemiplegic limb was significantly shorter (P<0.01) and F-wave amplitude was markedly lower (P<0.01) in both groups compared with baseline, with the observation group showing a significant change compared with the control group (P<0.01). Additionally, the scores of FMA-UE and MAS in both groups were improved compared with those before treatment (P<0.01), and the scores of the observation group were significantly better than those of the control group (P<0.01).

Acupuncture at Jiaji can inhibit the excitability of motor nerves, reduce muscle tension, alleviate spasticity, and enhance motor function recovery in patients with upper limb spasticity after stroke hemiplegia, thereby improving their quality of life.

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 目的: 观察针刺夹脊对卒中偏瘫侧上肢痉挛患者F波潜伏期、波幅的影响和临床疗效。方法: 随机将76例中风偏瘫患者分为观察组（38例，脱落3例）和对照组（38例，脱落2例）。对照组进行内科基础常规治疗、针刺（患侧肩髃、曲池、环跳、阳陵泉等穴）和康复训练，观察组在对照组治疗基础上加针刺偏瘫侧颈4~胸5夹脊，留针30 min，每日1次，每周5次，治疗4周。分别于治疗前、治疗4周后测量患者患侧正中神经F波潜伏期、波幅变化并评估改良Ashworth量表（MAS）、Fugl-Meyer上肢运动功能量表（FMA-UE）的评分情况。结果: 治疗4周后，两组患者偏瘫侧F波的潜伏期均较治疗前缩短（P<0.01），波幅降低（P<0.01），观察组较对照组变化更显著（P<0.01）。两组患者FMA-UE、MAS评分与治疗前相比均改善（P<0.01），观察组变化较对照组显著（P<0.01）。结论: 针刺夹脊能够抑制运动神经兴奋性，降低中风偏瘫后上肢痉挛患者的肌张力，缓解痉挛，促进上肢运动功能的恢复，提高患者的生活质量。.
